text: Artificial intelligence (AI) is changing many industries, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major issue is bias. If AI learns from old data that contains unfair patterns, it can make prejudiced decisions. To ensure fairness, we need to train AI on balanced data. Privacy is another big concern. AI systems often collect personal information, so developers must protect that data carefully. Transparency is also key—users should understand how AI makes choices, so it is not a mystery. Finally, responsible AI development means building technology that respects these values. By considering ethics from the start, we can create AI that helps everyone fairly and safely.
